title: Subtitle Manifest
description: Canonical subtitle output from the align step. This is the single source of truth consumed by Phase 7 (video muxer). Time轴不可丢失 — start/end are mandatory.

layout.description: Subtitle layout: bilingual (source + translated) or chinese_only (translated only)

segments.description: Each segment must have start, end, source_text, and translated_text. Time轴不可丢失 — start/end must match source_segments exactly.

start.description: Start time in seconds (float). Must match source_segments exactly — no rounding.

end.description: End time in seconds (float). Must match source_segments exactly — no rounding.
